title: SurvivalTop
description: The best wealth calculation plugin! Supports many land claim types! Rank wealth of players/groups!
body:
![SurvivalTop](https://i.imgur.com/cBd10IN.png) ## Sneak Peeks ![](https://i.imgur.com/672b1LW.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/iDigQoo.gif) ![](https://imgur.com/TaZOhsV.gif) **Have questions? Visit the wiki or get help on discord:** [![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/SurvivalTop/wiki) [![](https://i.imgur.com/ZIMj2rG.png)](https://discord.gg/X8VSdZvBQY)
### What is SurvivalTop? **SurvivalTop** is a powerful wealth tracking plugin for your server's economy! It currently supports the following features: - Support for plenty of land claim plugins: - GriefPrevention - Residence - UltimateClaims - GriefDefender - RedProtect - FactionsUUID - CrashClaim - Towny Advanced - KingdomsX - SaberFactions - PlotSquared - Support for plenty of group plugins: - FactionsUUID - KingdomsX - Towny Advanced (both towns & nations!) - mcMMO - Parties - SaberFactions - Option to include player balance in calculating wealth (requires Vault) - Option to include blocks within land/claims in calculating wealth - Option to include spawners within land/claims in calculating wealth - Option to include items in containers (e.g chest, hoppers) within land/claims in calculating wealth - Option to include items in player inventories in calculating wealth - Option to assign any values to all block/spawner/container/inventory item types for calculation of wealth - Option to use PAPI values in calculating wealth - Option to set calculation mode & heights to optimize performance - Option to show leaderboard for individual players - Option to show leaderboard for groups - Option to set leaderboard signs + heads! - Option to store leaderboard (YAML/MySQL) - Support for spawners including but not limited to WildStackers, SpawnerMeta, MineableSpawners and SilkSpawners - PlaceholderAPI support (requires PlaceholderAPI) - Allow players to view their own stats/wealth - Allow players to view block/spawner/container/inventory item values info - Fully customizable UI! - Fully customizable leaderboard update intervals, hover interactions and more! - Fully customizable messages (with options for your own language files!)
### You can find tutorials for the setup as well as more information on the wiki page below!
[![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/SurvivalTop/wiki) ### Like my work? Check out my other plugins below!
